common.footerGen: Archive page · CESeg / SBC. Generated on 2026-06-17.

home.title: SBSeg: Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity · Historical archive
home.metaDesc: Historical archive of the editions of SBSeg, the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity, promoted by CESeg/SBC. Chronological index with preserved static copies of each edition.
home.eyebrow: Special Committee on Cybersecurity (CESeg) · Brazilian Computer Society (SBC)
home.lead: SBSeg is Brazil's leading national research forum on information security and cybersecurity. This is the event's historical archive: an index of the editions over the years, with preserved offline copies and access to each edition's website.
home.renameEventOld: Brazilian Symposium on Information and Computer Systems Security
home.renameCommOld: Special Committee on Information and Computer Systems Security
home.renameNote: Up to the 2024 edition the longer name was in use; from 2025 the current, official and more concise name took effect. The acronyms SBSeg and CESeg were kept.
home.cardOrgP: General Chairs and Program Committee Chairs (main track) of each edition.
home.cardSpeakersP: Invited keynote speakers from previous editions, with affiliation and links.
home.cardAwardsP: Award-winning papers by edition, across all categories and sub-events.
home.cardPhotosP: Thumbnails and links to each edition's photo albums (website, Google Drive and social media).
home.cardSponsorsP: Sponsors and supporters across the editions, organized by tier.
home.archiveNote: Several editions have a preserved static copy in this project, browsable offline should the original site go down. Where a copy exists, the Offline archive button appears on the edition card; the Original site button points to the live site (when still available).
home.colophon:
SBSeg: Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity
Special Committee on Cybersecurity (CESeg) · Brazilian Computer Society (SBC)
Historical archive of editions · updated on 2026-06-17
home.collab: Collaboration and contribution: AI Horizon Labs helping the community with this site.

org.title: Organizers and Technical PC Chairs · SBSeg Editions
org.metaDesc: General Chairs and Technical Program Committee Chairs (main track) of every edition of SBSeg, the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity.
org.lead: List of the General Chairs (general organizers) and the Technical Program Committee Chairs of the main track of each edition of the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity (SBSeg). The data was compiled from the committee/organization pages preserved in this historical archive.
org.note: The 2011 (Brasília), 2015 (Florianópolis), 2016 (Niterói) and 2023 (Juiz de Fora) editions do not yet have committee pages preserved in this archive; their chairs will be added in a future stage, as the sources are recovered.
org.footer: Archive page · CESeg / SBC. Generated on 2026-06-17. Data compiled from the organization/committee pages of each edition preserved in this historical archive.

speakers.title: Speakers of the SBSeg Editions
speakers.lead: A compilation of the invited keynote speakers from previous editions of the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity (SBSeg). Includes name, affiliation and academic/professional links when available.
speakers.note: Data compiled from the Previous Editions page of SBSeg 2025 and from the speaker pages of each edition. Current coverage: 2017 to 2025 (35 keynote speakers). The 2012–2016 editions and the speakers' photos will be added in a future stage.
speakers.footer: Archive page · CESeg / SBC. Generated on 2026-06-17. Primary source: SBSeg 2025 · Previous Editions.

awards.title: Awards of the SBSeg Editions
awards.lead: List of the award-winning papers in each edition of the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity, organized by sub-event and award category. Current coverage: 84 awards in the editions with an available source.
awards.note: Editions included so far: 2025, 2024, 2017, 2014 and 2012 (those with an accessible awards list). The remaining editions will be added as the sources are located.

sponsors.title: Sponsors of the SBSeg Editions
sponsors.metaDesc: Sponsors and supporters of the SBSeg editions, the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity, organized by sponsorship tier.
sponsors.lead: Sponsors and supporters of the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity (SBSeg), organized by sponsorship tier. The logos were preserved from the sponsor pages of each edition in this historical archive.
sponsors.note2025: The SBSeg 2025 sponsorship tiers were Master, Infinity, Platinum, Diamond, Gold, Silver, Bronze and Supporters. The logos were loaded dynamically on the original site and were not captured in the offline copy; see the full list on the live page.
sponsors.note: Current coverage: 2014, 2021, 2022, 2024 and 2025 with preserved logos. The remaining editions will be added as the sources are recovered. Institutions such as CNPq, CAPES, FAPESP, CGI.br and NIC.br frequently appear as institutional funders/supporters of the event.
sponsors.footer: Archive page · CESeg / SBC. Generated on 2026-06-17. Logos compiled from the sponsor pages of each edition preserved in this historical archive.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery of the SBSeg Editions
gallery.metaDesc: Photo gallery of the SBSeg editions, the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity: thumbnails and links to each edition's albums (website, Google Drive and social media).
gallery.h1: Photo Gallery of the SBSeg Editions
gallery.lead: Thumbnails and links to the photo albums of the editions of the Brazilian Symposium on Cybersecurity (SBSeg). Where a preserved copy exists in this archive, the thumbnails lead to the offline gallery; otherwise the buttons point to the album on the original website, Google Drive or the edition's social media.
gallery.driveNote: The official photos of this edition are hosted on the event's Google Drive and Instagram.
gallery.fbNote: The photos of this edition are published on the event's official Facebook page.
gallery.note: Current coverage: 2015, 2017, 2022, 2024 and 2025. The 2017 and 2022 thumbnails come from the copies preserved in this archive; the other editions link to the original albums (Google Drive, Facebook and Instagram). Other editions will be added as photo sources are located.
gallery.footer: Archive page · CESeg / SBC. Generated on 2026-06-19. Thumbnails preserved from the photo pages of each edition; full albums on the original websites and social media.
gallery.socialNote: No copy of photos is preserved in this archive for this edition. The event records are on the official SBSeg social media.
